lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and visible wear on the body and interior. It requires extensive repairs to be roadworthy.

The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior is heavily worn and requires extensive repair. The mechanical components are currently unreliable and need major work.

Looking for a budget-friendly project or a reliable source of parts? This vehicle has seen plenty of miles and will definitely need some mechanical attention and bodywork to get back to its best, but it's a fantastic opportunity for a handy DIYer! Sold as-is, it's the perfect low-cost entry into your next restoration adventure.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches, chips, or dents, and the car has been meticulously kept in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the interior is immaculate, showing zero signs of wear on the upholstery, carpets, or dashboard. Mechanically, the car is perfect, with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule and a full service history included. Every feature and electronic component works exactly as intended. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a vehicle in pristine, collector-grade condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable option for a buyer who prioritizes utility over aesthetics. The exterior shows its age with several minor door dings and noticeable clear coat failure on the roof and trunk lid. Inside, the cabin remains functional, though the driver's seat shows significant bolster wear and there is some light staining on the carpet. Mechanically, the car runs and drives well, but prospective owners should be aware that it will likely require a suspension refresh and new tires within the next year. All essential electronics, including the heater and sound system, are in working order. This car is an honest daily driver that has been priced appropriately for its current cosmetic and mechanical state.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value. Presenting in a well-preserved state, it offers a refined driving experience complemented by a clean interior and robust mechanical integrity. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber automobile at a competitive market valuation.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she's been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. If you're looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road, this is the one! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—you're going to love how it drives!

This E92 M3 is a purist's specification, featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 paired with a crisp 7-speed M-DCT dual-clutch transmission. The powertrain is mechanically sound, having undergone preventative rod bearing and throttle actuator service to ensure longevity. Performance is anchored by the M Variable Differential Lock and Electronic Damper Control (EDC), providing exceptional lateral grip and damping versatility. The chassis remains taut, showcasing the balanced 50/50 weight distribution and communicative hydraulic steering rack. While the exterior displays minor road-wear consistent with its condition, the mechanical vitals are optimized for spirited driving and track-day reliability.
Used car in good condition. Reliable performance. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Well-maintained engine.
Used car. Condition: good.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a seamless blend of performance and sophisticated styling. Every component has been evaluated to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for reliability and comfort. This is an exceptional acquisition for those seeking quality and lasting value in a pre-owned executive vehicle.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen offers a seamless balance of performance and reliability, having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and roadworthiness. An ideal acquisition for the professional seeking a dependable, high-caliber transport solution.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been treated with a lot of love? This beauty is in really solid shape and is totally ready for its next adventure! It runs like a dream, the interior is super comfy, and it’s been well-maintained so you can hit the road with total confidence. It's the perfect mix of style and dependability. Come take it for a spin—I promise you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a 8,000 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock. This example has undergone proactive maintenance, including a VANOS system refresh and subframe reinforcement to preserve chassis rigidity under high lateral loads. The suspension geometry remains tight, utilizing forged aluminum control arms for reduced unsprung mass and communicative steering feedback. With its linear power delivery and visceral induction note, this naturally aspirated icon offers a pure mechanical connection for the discerning driver.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Maintenance records available. Runs well.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes an excellent balance between daily reliability and premium comfort. The exterior presents beautifully, showcasing a vibrant finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with responsible ownership. Inside, the cabin is clean and inviting, featuring well-preserved seating and fully functional electronics. Mechanically, it remains in solid health, having undergone consistent preventative maintenance to ensure a smooth, responsive ride. Whether you're commuting or taking a long weekend getaway, this car offers a dependable and enjoyable driving experience. It is a complete package for anyone seeking a quality pre-owned vehicle that has been treated with genuine care.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable order, it offers a refined driving experience consistent with our rigorous standards. Each mechanical system has been thoroughly vetted to ensure continued reliability and roadworthiness. We invite discerning buyers to acquire this exceptional example of engineering excellence.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a synthesis of performance and enduring value. Subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection, the automobile presents in commendable mechanical and aesthetic order, reflecting a history of consistent care. The interior remains refined, while the exterior retains its sophisticated profile. This offering provides a balanced acquisition for those who prioritize engineering integrity and professional presentation.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone who wants a reliable car that still looks great on the road. I’ve taken good care of it, and it's totally ready for its next big adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to see it go to a good home!
Used car. Condition: good.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Runs well. Minor cosmetic wear.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a fantastic balance of luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, expected surface marks consistent with careful daily use. Inside, the smoke-free cabin is in excellent shape, featuring supple leather upholstery with minimal wear on the bolsters and a full suite of responsive electronics and climate controls. Mechanically, the car is sound; it has a documented history of regular oil changes and recently passed a comprehensive multi-point inspection, including a fresh brake service and tire rotation. The engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts effortlessly, providing a confident and comfortable driving experience. Perfect for anyone seeking a high-quality, dependable ride that looks as good as it performs.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle exemplifies consistent maintenance and mechanical reliability. Its exterior maintains a sharp, professional profile, while the cabin offers a refined environment indicative of careful stewardship. Thoroughly inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this unit represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated balance of performance and value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle exemplifies dependable performance and refined engineering. Thoroughly inspected to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal, it offers an exceptional balance of luxury and longevity. A premier acquisition for the discerning driver seeking quality and reliability.

Hey everyone! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape—super reliable and perfect for your daily commute or weekend getaways. I’ve taken great care of it, and it’s ready for its next adventure with you! Drop me a message if you want to take it for a spin!
Available is a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six. This example is mechanically sorted, featuring a comprehensive VANOS overhaul
Reliable vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained interior. Recent service completed.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and remains in impressive operational and cosmetic shape. The exterior maintains a deep, lustrous finish with only minor road wear consistent with responsible use. Inside, the premium upholstery is clean and free of tears, smoke, or odors, showing just light softening on the driver's bolster. Mechanically, it is sound; all service intervals have been strictly followed, and the engine pulls smoothly with a responsive transmission. Tires have plenty of tread remaining, and the electronics function exactly as they should. It’s a reliable, turn-key example that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and value.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a distinguished combination of performance and reliability. This unit has been thoroughly vetted to ensure mechanical integrity and remains in commendable condition, making it an ideal acquisition for those who prioritize long-term value. Experience a refined driving experience in a motorcar that has been preserved with professional care.
